content.full_text:
July 17, 1990

Ms. Jeanette E. Turvill  
Political Reform Consultant - Legal Division  
California Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
P.O. Box 807, California 95814  
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Dear Ms. Turvill:

We currently have a member of our Board of Trustees, Mr. Laurence L. Laurent, who will be in a runoff election on November 6, 1990, for a seat on the San Luis Obispo County Board of Supervisors.

In anticipation that he may be successful in his bid for election, would you please let me know as soon as possible if you see any conflict of interest or possible legal problem with a member of the San Luis Obispo County Community College District Board of Trustees serving simultaneously on the San Luis Obispo County Board of Supervisors. Any indication you could give me would be most helpful.

Sincerely,

Grace N. Mitchell  
Superintendent-President
